title: pelargonium × veitchianum
intro: Pelargonium × veitchianum, commonly known as Rose Geranium or Sweet Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross-breeding of Pelargonium roseum and Pelargonium capitatum. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in aromatherapy and herbal remedies, due to their high content of geraniol, a compound with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × veitchianum include stress relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
